briefdescription.para: Maximum number of driver instances running at the same time.
Number of instances that exist at any given time.
Initializes one instance of the OFDM driver and traverses the "/sys/bus/platform/device" directory (in Linux) to find the registered OFDM device with the name DeviceNodeName.

detaileddescription.para: The first available slot in the instances array XDfeOfdm_Ofdm[] will be taken as a DeviceNodeName object. On success, it moves the state machine to a Ready state, while on failure, it stays in a Not Ready state.

listitem.para: Pointer to the instance if successful.

briefdescription.para: Closes the instances of the OFDM driver and moves the state machine to a Not Ready state.
Resets the OFDM instance and puts block into a reset state.
Reads configuration from device tree/xparameters.h and IP registers.

detaileddescription.para: Removes the S/W reset and moves the state machine to a configured state.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the OFDM driver and moves the state machine to an initialized state.
Activates OFDM and moves the state machine to an activated state.
Deactivates OFDM and moves the state machine to an initialised state.
Gets a state machine state ID.

detaileddescription.para: Not used slot ID in a sequence (Sequence.CCID[Index]) are represented as (-1), not the value in registers.

simplesect.para: For a sequence conversion see XDfeOfdm_AddCCtoCCCfg() comment.

briefdescription.para: Returns configuration structure CCCfg with CCCfg->CCSequence.Length value set in XDfeOfdm_Configure(), array CCCfg->CCSequence.CCID[] members are set to not used value (-1) and the other CCCfg members are set to 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfeOfdm *InstancePtr, XDfeOfdm_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 *CCSeqBitmap, XDfeOfdm_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfeOfdm_GetCarrierCfg

briefdescription.para: Returns the current CCID carrier configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeOfdm *InstancePtr, XDfeOfdm_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfeOfdm_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, XDfeOfdm_FTSequence *FTSeq)
memberdef.name: XDfeOfdm_AddCCtoCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Adds specified CCID, with specified configuration, to a local CC configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error. Initiates CC update (enable CCUpdate trigger TUSER Single Shot).

The returned CCCfg.CCSequence is translated as there is no explicit indication that SEQUENCE[i] is not used - 0 can define the slot as either used or not used. Sequence data that is returned in the CCIDSequence is not the same as what is written in the registers. The translation is:
CCIDSequence.CCID[i] = -1 - if [i] is unused slot
CCIDSequence.CCID[i] = CCID - if [i] is used slot
A returned CCIDSequence->Length = length in register + 1

briefdescription.para: Removes specified CCID from a local CC configuration structure.

simplesect.para: For a sequence conversion see XDfeOfdm_AddCCtoCCCfg comment.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeOfdm *InstancePtr, XDfeOfdm_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, const XDfeOfdm_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, XDfeOfdm_FTSequence *FTSeq)
memberdef.name: XDfeOfdm_UpdateCCinCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Updates a specified CCID with the specified configuration to a local CC configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error.

briefdescription.para: Reads the triggers and sets the enable bit of Update trigger.

detaileddescription.para: If Mode = IMMEDIATE, the trigger will be applied immediately.

briefdescription.para: Writes local CC configuration to the shadow (NEXT) registers and triggers copying from shadow to operational registers.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfeOfdm *InstancePtr, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfeOfdm_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, XDfeOfdm_FTSequence *FTSeq)
memberdef.name: XDfeOfdm_AddCC

briefdescription.para: Sets the TUSER Framing bit location register where bit location indicates which bit to be used for sending the framing information on DL_DOUT IF and M_AXIS_TBASE IF.

detaileddescription.para: TUSER bit width is fixed to its default value of 8. Therefore, legal values of FRAME_BIT are 0 to 7.

briefdescription.para: Gets the TUSER Framing bit location register where bit location indicates which bit to be used for sending framing information on DL_DOUT IF and M_AXIS_TBASE IF.

detaileddescription.para: TUSER bit width is fixed to its default value of 8. Therefore, legal values of FRAME_BIT are 0 to 7.

briefdescription.para: Sets the TUSER CC Update trigger where bit location would indicate which bit to be used for sending cc update triggering on TUSER (DL_DOUT IF and M_AXIS_TBASE IF).

detaileddescription.para: TUSER bit width is fixed to its default value of 8. Therefore, legal values of FRAME_BIT are 0 to 7.

briefdescription.para: Gets the TUSER CC Update trigger.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a returned event status.

Clear event status container.
0 - Does not clear the corresponding event status
1 - Clears the corresponding event status

Interrupt mask value.
0 - Does not mask the corresponding interrupt
1 - Masks the corresponding interrupt

briefdescription.para: Sets the delay to be added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).
Reads the delay, which will be added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).
